Alex Turk [...] POGs: The Mobile Game

Alex Turk

POGs making a comeback in AR? That’s pure nostalgia meets modern tech! Can’t wait to relive the excitement of slamming and collecting. Speaking of fun and creative games, I recently got lost in Neal Fun Games — tons of quirky interactive experiences that are just as addictive. Definitely worth checking out while waiting for POGs AR to drop!
